name: Cummins Park
description: Cummins Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bristol, IN. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
open_play_schedule: See CourtReserve, Elkhart Count Pickleball, for detailed play times

name: Eastlake Athletic Club
description: Eastlake Athletic Club is a place to play pickleball in Elkhart, IN. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Elkhart Campground
description: Elkhart Campground is a place to play pickleball in Elkhart, IN. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private.
hours: Monday - Sunday 10 a.m - 8 p.m © CGI Communications Inc. Developed by e·LocalLink ™.

name: Elkhart Parks and Recreation Tolson Center
description: Elkhart Parks and Recreation Tolson Center is a place to play pickleball in Elkhart, IN. There are 3 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: First Baptist Church
description: First Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Bristol, IN. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.
open_play_schedule: See CourtReserve, Elkhart Count Pickleball, for detailed play times

name: Goshen Soccer Academy
description: Come play pickleball at Goshen Soccer Academy in Goshen, IN! There are 5 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include lights, food, restrooms, water, youth programming, and adaptive programming.

name: Model Elementary School
description: You can reserve courts, if needed by going to https://secure.rec1.com/IN/goshen-parks-and-recreation-in/catalog, otherwise come join others for open play.

name: Pickle Haus
description: The Pickle Haus has 6 indoor courts with excellent lighting! A new lobby, restrooms with showers completed in spring 2025. To reserve: Court Reserve app, Pickle Haus Pickleball Organization. Open Play sessions and Court Reservations available. Drop in $10 for 2 hour session. Memberships Available.
open_play_schedule: https://app.courtreserve.com/Portal/Pickle Haus Pickleball  Schedule & Sign up available through Court Reserve.

name: Stauffer Park
description: Come play pickleball at Stauffer Park in Nappanee, IN! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Studebaker Park
description: Come play pickleball at Studebaker Park in Elkhart, IN! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Woodland Pickleball Courts at FBC
description: Closed for the season due to ongoing construction.
